footer.tagline: Architecting precision at every layer of the stack. {years}+ years building high-performance systems.
footer.quote: “Simple is better than complex” — Zen of Python

hero.description: Full-stack engineer building systems that carry weight — cloud architecture, conversational AI, and platforms that don't flinch under load. Thirteen years. Every layer of the stack.

philosophy.label: 01 — Philosophy
philosophy.quote: “Programming is more than solving problems — it's composing scalable systems wrapped in interfaces people trust.”
philosophy.body: For over thirteen years I've been architecting digital solutions from Guatemala for teams around the world. From complex database architectures to the micro-interactions on the frontend — every layer matters, and every layer gets built like it's the one that will fail first.
philosophy.globalImpactBody: Remote collaboration with teams worldwide. Python, TypeScript, React, Node.js, Rails.
philosophy.humanSideBody: Music, BMX, and one demanding cat. Clear communication and empathy, always.

items.title: Full-Stack Engineering
items.description: End-to-end product builds. Interfaces with intent, backends with backbone.

items.title: Architecture & APIs
items.description: Contracts and protocols designed so systems talk clearly — and keep talking.

items.title: Data & Cloud Systems

items.title: Conversational AI
items.description: Chatbots and LLM agents wired into real business workflows — automation that pays for itself.

approach.label: The Approach
approach.quote: “Simple is better than complex. But simple at scale is the hardest thing to build — and the only thing worth shipping.”

contactPage.description: Currently accepting a limited number of projects — architecture, full builds, or rescue missions. Tell me what you're building and I'll reply within 24 hours.
contactPage.messagePlaceholder: Tell me about the project — goals, timeline, current state
contactPage.step1Body: 30 minutes to understand the problem, the constraints, and whether we're a fit. No pitch.
contactPage.step2Body: Architecture, scope, timeline, and a fixed price. You know exactly what you're getting before anything is built.
contactPage.step3Body: Weekly demos on a live staging environment. You watch it grow — no black box, no surprises.
contactPage.step4Body: Deployment, documentation, and handoff — or ongoing partnership. 30+ systems still under my watch.
